vectorientation.configuration.title: Vectorientation Configuration
vectorientation.configuration.minStretch: Defines the vertical stretch at 0 velocity
Defines the horizontal squish at 0 velocity
vectorientation.configuration.stretchFac: Defines the amount vertical stretch increases with velocity
vectorientation.configuration.squishFact: Defines the amount horizontal squish increases with velocity
A list of blocks that should not be squished.
